title: Game Phases
text: Home * Evaluation * Game Phases The textbook division of game phases enumerates three of them: Opening Middlegame Endgame In the opening, the focus is on development , in the middlegame - on attack and defense, in the endgame - on pawn promotion and realization of the material advantage. Whereas this definition is good enough for humans, coding it in a straightforward manner would introduce evaluation discontinuity in many places. For that reason many programs define several game phases, based on the amount of material on the board.
